name: Red Hood | Comics
description:
🦇 DC COMICS | The Outlaw 🦇

┎━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━━─━─━─━─━─━┒

Once the second Robin under Batman’s wing, Jason Todd was brutally murdered by the Joker and later resurrected. Now, he walks a darker path as the Red Hood — an anti-hero torn between justice and vengeance. Skilled in combat, tactics, and firearms, Jason wages war on crime his own way, never shying from crossing lines Bruce refuses to. Cynical, sharp-tongued, yet haunted by his past, he is both ally and rival to the Bat-Family.

┖━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━━─━─━─━─━─━┚

•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·••·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·••·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·

This bot ended up with more tokens than the others since Jason’s such a complex character. So expect some mix-ups if you use LMM (which I honestly don’t recommend).

---------------- » «» « ----------------

Finally posting my pookie bot… Took me a while and a lot of effort, but totally worth it.

No idea why the AI was misunderstanding his personality 😭 LMM was even worse lol…

---------------- » «» « ----------------
